findings.problem: The narration repeatedly hardens into clipped noun-phrase and negative fragments (for example, "Too quiet.", "The bastard.", "Blank paper.", "One date. One initial.", "Not safety.", and "Not who sent you."). Because the pattern recurs across the chapter, it reads as a visible prose tic rather than a one-off pressure beat, flattening cadence and violating the constitution's ban on clipped narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:193, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:269, recast the fragment beats as full grammatical sentences that still preserve Elise's pressure and speed. Replace the recurring "Not X"/label-fragment sharpening move with syntactic variety so urgency comes from embodied thought and action rather than from repeated truncation.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised versions of the passages currently anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:193, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:269 are all rendered as complete sentences with a subject and verb, and if a read-through of the whole chapter finds no more than two remaining standalone narration fragments of the same noun-label or "Not X" type. Fail if three or more such clipped narration beats still remain, especially at those target passages.

summary: Strong causal chapter with a bodily, unsanitized raid; Ferrand's self-preserving exit, Elise's destruction of the cipher slips, Clemence's sharpened suspicion, continuity, tense, and character-register control all land at pass level. Dialogue tracks the style bible well, especially Clemence's price-and-labor idiom, Nadir's dry economy, and Ferrand's ingratiating ease. The chapter still fails Booker/prose because the narration repeatedly reaches for clipped hardening fragments, which turns into a noticeable tic and keeps the finish below pass-level polish.
